name: understand_codebase
description: Deep-dive codebase investigation. Analyzes a target file or directory to produce comprehensive architectural documentation covering model structure, data flow, dependencies, extension points, and bottlenecks.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target file or directory to investigate.

parameters.name: --investigation-only
parameters.description: Run investigation only, skip implementation/documentation phase.

returns: Workspace path containing the codebase analysis documentation.
